projects.name: AI Recruitment Platform
projects.description: Leverage AI models to scan resumes and automate initial screening interviews.

projects.name: NextGen Mobile Client
projects.description: Rewrite the React Native workspace app with offline-first support and instant synchronization.

projects.name: Legacy Cloud Migration
projects.description: Migrate legacy on-premise compute workloads and SQL servers to high-efficiency Cloud Run nodes.

projects.name: Internal Admin & Operations
projects.description: Routine operational syncing, training sessions, and HR administrative activities.

meetings.title: Architecture Alignment & GraphQL Strategy
meetings.description: Technical alignment session discussing query batching and DB schema updates for the NextGen Mobile layout. Discussed bottlenecks in mobile sync APIs.
meetings.attributionReasoning: Explicit technical mapping: GraphQL strategies are mapped strictly to NextGen Mobile Client rewrite.

meetings.title: AI Resume Parsing Pipeline Setup
meetings.description: Code walkthrough of Gemini extraction models and JSON parsers for candidate grading models.
meetings.attributionReasoning: Resume parsing pipeline aligns 100% with AI Recruitment Platform scan automations.

meetings.title: Massive Weekly Status Round-table Sync
meetings.description: Standard daily alignment with the entire organization. Every department gives a 5 minute update of status goals, regardless of relevance.
meetings.attributionReasoning: General status discussion defaulted to Internal Operations due to non-specific project alignment.

meetings.title: Random Coffee & Watercooler Alignment Session
meetings.description: Informal chat without preset agenda. Discussing weekend plans and office canteen coffee preferences.
meetings.attributionReasoning: The meeting is an informal social and alignment chat with no specific technical agenda, making it best suited for the general internal operations and administrative category.

meetings.title: Database Performance Finetuning
meetings.description: Troubleshooting read replicas and high index latch times for Postgres database instances in SQL engines.
meetings.attributionReasoning: Postgres tuning matched the database migrations in cloud migration pipelines.
